title: Festival Delicacies
description: A mod based around adding traditional Chinese festival foods.
body:
# ✨ Features

A mod based around adding traditional Chinese festival foods.

## 🥮 Mid-Autumn Festival 🌕

Four kinds of mooncakes:
- Five Nuts Mooncake
- Hawthorn with Jujube Paste Mooncake
- Lotus Seed Paste with Salted Yolk Mooncake
- Preserved Meat Mooncake

They can be placed on wooden plates, with each type of mooncake featuring a unique appearance.

## 🐉 Dragon Boat Festival 🚣

Sweet Zongzi and Meat Zongzi, along with related ingredients.

## 🏮 Spring Festival 🥟

Some features here is still under development.

Customizable fillings for dumplings and baozi.

You can further ban or expand available filling ingredients via the configuration file, and set limits on the nesting of custom fillings (e.g., a baozi filled with dumpling).

## 🌿 Miscellaneous 🍊

The mod also adds a series of ingredients such as red beans, lotus root, and rice, along with their corresponding crops and wild resources (some features here is still under development).

Players can get Unknown Seeds by breaking grass. Right-clicking while holding these seeds allows players to transform them to various crop seeds of this mod.

Additionally, functional blocks like Stove, Fermentation Jar, Drying Rack, and Chopping Block have been added to support cooking and ingredient processing.

# 📦 Early Development

The mod is currently in its early development stage, and some features is not yet complete. While playing, you may encounter bugs or crashes. It is strongly recommended to back up before using this mod. Please feel free to submit any issues you find about this mod.
